specific_location: North shore of DeWeese Reservoir. The reservoir is about 5 mile north of Westcliffe.
description: See photographs. No detailed observations were made.Behaviors: The bird was wading on the shoreline or swimming in the water just off the shore.Call: None heardPlumage: Non breeding, some molt plumage on wings
